calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jacob Harker, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Carl Ernst, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Aaron Bartlett.
Default was entered against defendant on June 18, 2010.
Dismissal with prejudice as to defendant Sparky's Electric was filed on May 12, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Carl Ernst, and against the Defaulted Defendant Aaron Bartlett as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $60,000.00.
Holdover Damages - $17,500.00.
Costs - $690.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $78,190.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-17-2010 Continued To Aug-31-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
